_comment: Single-source-of-truth model: the curated Bash allow list lives in ~/.claude/settings.json (user-global) and is merged additively with this file at runtime. This template ships only (a) defaultMode + hooks (per-project, can't be in global), (b) a defensive minimum allow list of Claude built-in tools so a fresh machine without ~/.claude/settings.json is still workable, (c) deny rules duplicated from global for defense in depth. To extend allow rules globally, edit ~/.claude/settings.json. To override per-project (e.g. allow a project-specific command), add to .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).
